info.name: ANPR Backend API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the ANPR (Automatic Number Plate Recognition) platform.

**Setup:**
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to `http://localhost:3000/api/v1`
2. Login (Admin) → tokens auto-saved to `accessToken` / `refreshToken`
3. App Login → tokens auto-saved to `appAccessToken` / `appRefreshToken`

body.raw:
{
  "vendorName": "ABC Parking Solutions",
  "contactPerson": "Ramesh Kumar",
  "phone": "9876543210",
  "email": "vendor@abcparking.com",
  "city": "Bangalore",
  "state": "Karnataka",
  "gstin": "29ABCDE1234F1Z5",
  "registeredAddress": "123, MG Road, Bangalore - 560001",
  "primaryService": "ANPR Cameras",
  "contractStartDate": "2026-04-23",
  "notes": "Primary vendor for south zone",
  "assignedSiteId": null,
  "password": "Vendor@123"
}

request.description:
assignedSiteId: pass a parking site UUID to allocate, or null to clear. Automatically syncs parking_sites.assigned_vendor_id bidirectionally.

Set "password" to a new value (min 6 chars) to update the vendor login password. Leave empty or omit to keep the current password.
Sets the specified vehicle as the primary vehicle for the user. Syncs parking_users.vehicle_number to the new primary plate.
Look up a vehicle by number plate before recording entry. Returns: registered user info, vehicle details, and whether the vehicle is already parked (active session).
Admin creates a visitor. invitedBy is optional — pass an app user UUID to link the visitor to that user (will appear in their app visitor list), or null for a walk-in guest.
